checks_date_from.description: Relative date string for the start of the check history window (e.g. '-24h', '-7d', '-14d'). Returns checks created after this time. Max retention is 14 days.

checks_date_to.description: Relative date string for the end of the check history window (e.g. '-1h', '-1d'). Defaults to now if not specified.

checks_limit.description: Maximum number of check results to return (default 5, max 500). Applied after date filtering.

checks_offset.description: Number of newest checks to skip (0-based). Use with checks_limit for pagination. Default 0.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this alert configuration.
